title: Interop example: mappings to decisions
description: The DECISIONS item reads facts written by the preceding MAPPINGS item through read-after-write semantics.

$.context.data.facts.validation.title: Validation facts

errorCount.title: Validation error count
errorCount.description: Number of blocking validation errors found in the input.

$.context.data.facts.validation.description: Facts produced by the mappings item and consumed by the decisions item in the same dataflow.

$.context.data.decisions.validation.title: Validation decision

outcome.title: Validation outcome
outcome.description: Outcome selected by the decisions item from validation facts.

$.context.data.decisions.validation.description: Decision result selected from validation facts.

pipeline.title: Derive validation facts
pipeline.description: Maps validation runtime output into stable facts for the decision layer.

pipeline.title: Choose validation outcome
pipeline.description: Reads facts produced by the previous item and returns an outcome.
